title: ononis serrata var. diffusa
intro: Ononis serrata var. diffusa is a plant species belonging to the Ononis genus, commonly known as a type of spiny restharrow. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ononis serrata var. diffusa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its dried roots and leaves can also be used in herbal remedies.
